login.heading: Log in
login.hint: Dev login: any email works when the backend runs with DEV_AUTH_ENABLED=true.
login.failed: Login failed — is the backend up?

home.heading: It works
home.body: This is the post-init shell: typed API client, auth, routing, tests, SSR opt-in. Add your first feature under src/features/ and route it in src/app/router.tsx.

auction.errorList: Couldn’t load auctions — is the backend up?
auction.empty: No auctions yet. Log in and create one via the API.
auction.detailError: Couldn’t load this auction — does it exist?
auction.bidAmountPositive: Bid must be a positive amount
auction.bidFailed: Couldn’t place the bid — try again.
auction.bidNone: No bids yet — be the first.
auction.rejectBidTooLow: Bid too low — someone got there first. The current price has moved.
auction.rejectAlreadyHighest: You already hold the highest bid.
auction.rejectOwnAuction: You can’t bid on your own auction.
auction.rejectNotOpen: This auction is no longer open for bids.
auction.rejectAuthExpired: Your session expired — log in again to bid.
